surface.name: CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial + cockroach sql first queries
surface.selection_basis: Official Quickstart creates a CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial cluster with $400 credits and a SQL user. Connect docs document the CockroachDB Client (cockroach sql) path for first SQL without cloning language samples. Java/Node sample apps are optional peers on the same quickstart.

alternatives_considered.name: Java quickstart sample
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Requires cloning quickstart-code-samples and Gradle; SQL client reaches first queries with fewer tooling steps.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a CockroachDB Cloud trial Standard cluster, create a SQL user, connect with cockroach sql, and run first queries.
assumed_prior_state: No CockroachDB Cloud organization or cluster exists.
A terminal can install the CockroachDB client.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Run first SQL statements on the Cloud cluster
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: cockroach sql connects to the Standard cluster and executes SQL successfully.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The SQL shell accepts statements and returns query results (for example a simple SELECT).

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Connect to a Standard Cluster documents cockroach sql until You are now connected and can run CockroachDB SQL statements.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First Cloud success is authenticated SQL against the trial cluster. Language samples are optional.

prerequisites.requirement: CockroachDB Cloud account; first org receives $400 free trial credits.
CockroachDB client binary for cockroach sql.

primary_path.action: Create a CockroachDB Cloud account and open Get Started.
Create a Standard cluster (cloud, region, default capacity) without payment while trial is active.
Create a SQL user, Generate & save password, and store the password.
From Connect, select CockroachDB Client, install the client, and copy the cockroach sql connection command.
Run cockroach sql with the provided connection string and enter the SQL password.
Run a first SQL statement and confirm results.

friction_gates.description: Free trial credits cover creation; payment method required by end of trial to keep clusters.

sources.title: Connect to a CockroachDB Standard Cluster
